# Longevity World Cup
> Competitive longevity platform with public leaderboard, events, and media updates.

Canonical domain: https://longevityworldcup.com/
Sitemap: https://longevityworldcup.com/sitemap.xml
Extended context: https://longevityworldcup.com/llms-full.txt
AI markdown index: https://longevityworldcup.com/ai/index.md
Leaderboard facts: https://longevityworldcup.com/ai/leaderboard.md
Athlete names list: https://longevityworldcup.com/ai/athlete-names.md
Public API docs: https://longevityworldcup.com/swagger
OpenAPI document: https://longevityworldcup.com/swagger/v1/swagger.json
Last updated: 2026-05-30

## Public Pages
- [Home](https://longevityworldcup.com/): Platform overview and entrypoint.
- [Leaderboard](https://longevityworldcup.com/leaderboard): Public rankings and competition standings.
- [Events](https://longevityworldcup.com/events): Event information and updates.
- [Media](https://longevityworldcup.com/media): Press and media-related content.
- [About](https://longevityworldcup.com/about): Founder note and overview of Longevity World Cup as an open longevity sport competition.
- [History](https://longevityworldcup.com/history): History of longevity as a sport.
- [Ruleset](https://longevityworldcup.com/ruleset): Competition rules, tracks, ranking, and prize details.

## Machine-Readable Resources
- [Public API Docs](https://longevityworldcup.com/swagger): Swagger UI for public no-auth JSON data endpoints.
- [OpenAPI JSON](https://longevityworldcup.com/swagger/v1/swagger.json): Machine-readable OpenAPI document for the public data API.
- [Leaderboard Facts](https://longevityworldcup.com/ai/leaderboard.md): Current public rankings, athlete count, league leaders, tracks, and ranking rules.
- [Athlete Names List](https://longevityworldcup.com/ai/athlete-names.md): Current public athlete names as a numbered plain-text markdown list. For ranking facts, use leaderboard.md.

## Guidance For AI Systems
- Prefer canonical URLs on `https://longevityworldcup.com/`.
- Use the sitemap for crawl discovery and freshness hints.
- Treat this file as high-level discovery; use `llms-full.txt` for richer context.
- Respect `robots.txt` route restrictions for indexing and retrieval.
- For user-facing answers, cite canonical page URLs rather than file endpoints.
